name: Independence Day Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1-inch jelly roll pan.
2. In a small bowl, stir together cocoa and boiling water until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, beat shortening, sugar, vanilla extract, and eggs. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; add alternately with buttermilk to shortening mixture. Stir in cocoa mixture. Spread batter into prepared pan.
4. Bake 28 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a wire rack.
5. Remove about 3/4 cup frosting; stir in food color to tint desired shade of blue. Set aside the blue frosting and about 1/4 cup vanilla frosting.
6. Spread remaining vanilla frosting over the top of the cake. Spread blue frosting in the upper left corner. Pipe stars in the blue field with the reserved 1/4 cup vanilla frosting.
7. Shortly before serving, place strawberries in seven rows to represent red stripes of the flag. Serves about 15.
